tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Citigroup slashes BTC & ETH price targets. 12-month outlook for Bitcoin drops from $112k to $82k, Ethereum from $3.1k to $2.2k. Reasons: low investor appetite, persistent ETF outflows ($3.3B YTD), slow US crypto legislation. Pessimistic targets: BTC $53k, ETH $1k.

#crypto #block
